message: Mobile view Ui bug right scroll?
resolution: Fixed horizontal scroll on mobile. Partner cards and dual-CTA section were overflowing the viewport due to a CSS cascade issue. Now correctly single-column on mobile with no horizontal overflow.
Fixed. The extra right space was caused by layout elements overflowing the viewport width. Resolved by correcting the mobile CSS so all sections stay within the screen width.
Fixed. The For Customers / For Merchants cards were squished into 2 columns on mobile, distorting the buttons. Now correctly stacked single-column with proper pill-shaped buttons.

message: Make sure all are mobile friendly. U see the header is too cramp
resolution: Fixed. On mobile, the nav bar was showing the logo, a CTA button, and the hamburger icon together, making it cramped. The CTA button is now hidden on mobile — the mobile menu (hamburger) contains all navigation options including the app link.
